title: Add Carl Gustav Jung to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Shadow work with Polly
gist.blurb: A new community bot brings Carl Jung to the hive. Now you can analyze fiction and images through the lens of applied psychology and Jungian principles.
gist.summary: Added a new Carl Gustav Jung messenger bot to the community showcase that analyzes fiction and images using applied psychology.
gist.impact: Users can now interact with a Jungian chatbot for educational and entertainment analysis of their favorite stories and images.
gist.visual_concept: The PR introduces a Carl Jung chatbot. Visual symbols include psychology, books, a psychoanalyst couch, and the Jungian 'shadow'. The scene will feature Polly the bee engaging in some cozy psychoanalysis or reading a thick psychology book.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny round glasses, reading a thick psychology book while sitting on a miniature psychoanalyst couch. A soft glowing shadow of the bee appears on the wall behind her. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
